name: Stress Management Mastery
description: A comprehensive 14-day program designed to help you identify, understand, and effectively manage stress through proven techniques including mindfulness, breathing exercises, and cognitive reframing.

steps.title: Understanding Your Stress
steps.description: Learn to identify your personal stress triggers and patterns
steps.content: Track your stress levels throughout the day and identify common triggers

steps.title: Breathing Techniques
steps.description: Master the 4-7-8 breathing method for instant stress relief
steps.content: Practice deep breathing exercises to calm your nervous system
